# The General Linear Model {general-linear-model}

```{r general-linear-model-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/general-linear-model-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/general-linear-model/"
)
```

```{r child-general-linear-model, child="../lecture-content/25-general-linear-model.Rmd"}
```
